en: "Why are not times of judgment kept by the Almighty, and why do those who know him never see his days?
zh: “為甚麼全能者不保留賞善罰惡的時間？ 為甚麼認識他的人不能看見他的日子？

en: Some move landmarks; they seize flocks and pasture them.
zh: 惡人挪移地界， 搶奪群畜去牧養。

en: They drive away the donkey of the fatherless; they take the widow's ox for a pledge.
zh: 他們趕走孤兒的驢， 強取寡婦的牛作抵押。

en: They thrust the poor off the road; the poor of the earth all hide themselves.
zh: 他們使窮人離開大道， 世上的貧民都一起躲藏起來。

en: Behold, like wild donkeys in the desert the poor go out to their toil, seeking game; the wasteland yields food for their children.
zh: 這些貧窮人像曠野的野驢， 出外勞碌，殷勤尋覓食物， 野地為他們和他們的孩子供應食物。

en: They gather their fodder in the field, and they glean the vineyard of the wicked man.
zh: 他們在田裡收割草料， 在惡人的葡萄園中摘取剩餘的葡萄。

en: They lie all night naked, without clothing, and have no covering in the cold.
zh: 他們赤身露體無衣過夜， 在寒冷中毫無遮蓋。

en: They are wet with the rain of the mountains and cling to the rock for lack of shelter.
zh: 他被山上的大雨淋濕， 因為沒有躲避之處就緊抱磐石。

en: (There are those who snatch the fatherless child from the breast, and they take a pledge against the poor.)
zh: 有人從母親的懷中搶走孤兒， 又強取窮人的衣物作抵押，

en: They go about naked, without clothing; hungry, they carry the sheaves;
zh: 因此窮人赤身露體流浪， 他們因飢餓就抬走禾捆；

en: among the olive rows of the wicked they make oil; they tread the winepresses, but suffer thirst.
zh: 他們在那些人的橄欖樹行列內榨油 ， 又在葡萄園裡踹酒 ，但自己仍然口渴。

en: From out of the city the dying groan, and the soul of the wounded cries for help; yet God charges no one with wrong.
zh: 有人從城裡唉哼， 受傷的人呼求， 神卻不理會惡人的愚妄。

en: "There are those who rebel against the light, who are not acquainted with its ways, and do not stay in its paths.
zh: 又有人與光為敵， 不認識光明的道， 不留在光明的路中。

en: The murderer rises before it is light, that he may kill the poor and needy, and in the night he is like a thief.
zh: 殺人的黎明起來， 殺戮困苦人與窮人， 夜間又去作盜賊。

en: The eye of the adulterer also waits for the twilight, saying, 'No eye will see me'; and he veils his face.
zh: 姦夫的眼睛等待黃昏， 說：‘沒有眼可以看見我’， 就把自己的臉蒙起來。

en: In the dark they dig through houses; by day they shut themselves up; they do not know the light.
zh: 盜賊黑夜挖穿屋子， 白天卻躲藏起來， 他們不想認識光明。

en: For deep darkness is morning to all of them; for they are friends with the terrors of deep darkness.
zh: 他們看晨光如死蔭， 因為他們認識死蔭的驚駭。

en: "You say, 'Swift are they on the face of the waters; their portion is cursed in the land; no treader turns toward their vineyards.
zh: 這些惡人如水面上飄浮的東西迅速流逝， 他們在世上所得的分被咒詛， 他們不能再走葡萄園的路。

en: Drought and heat snatch away the snow waters; so does Sheol those who have sinned.
zh: 乾旱與炎熱怎樣消除雪水， 陰間也這樣除去犯罪的人。

en: The womb forgets them; the worm finds them sweet; they are no longer remembered, so wickedness is broken like a tree.'
zh: 懷他的母胎忘記他， 蟲子要以他為甘甜， 他不再被人記念， 不義的人必如樹折斷。

en: "They wrong the barren childless woman, and do no good to the widow.
zh: 他惡待不能生育，沒有孩子的婦人， 也不善待寡婦。

en: Yet God prolongs the life of the mighty by his power; they rise up when they despair of life.
zh: 神卻用自己的能力延長強暴的人的性命， 生命難保的仍然興起。

en: He gives them security, and they are supported, and his eyes are upon their ways.
zh: 神使他們安穩，他們就有所倚靠， 他的眼也看顧他們的道路。

en: They are exalted a little while, and then are gone; they are brought low and gathered up like all others; they are cut off like the heads of grain.
zh: 他們被高舉不過片時，就沒有了， 他們降為卑，如眾人一樣被收拾起來， 他們又如穀穗枯乾。

en: If it is not so, who will prove me a liar and show that there is nothing in what I say?"
zh: 如果不是這樣，誰能證明我是撒謊的， 指出我的言語為空虛的呢？”
